subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my God, my Master and my Ruler! These are beings whose essence hath been refined, purified and made delicate, and who stand before the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و سیدی و مولائی هولاء کینونات رقت و صفت و لطفت و تقابلت شمس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for teaching, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
